message:
feat(stdlib): add signal, mmap, fcntl, termios, pty, tty modules

- signal: signal handling, raise_signal, alarm, pause, setitimer,
  all SIG* constants (SIGINT, SIGTERM, etc), SIG_DFL, SIG_IGN
- mmap: memory-mapped file I/O with find, read, write, seek, resize
- fcntl: file control ops (fcntl, ioctl, flock, lockf), F_* constants
- termios: terminal I/O control, tcgetattr/tcsetattr, baud rates,
  input/output/control/local flags, control characters
- pty: pseudo-terminal (fork, openpty, spawn)
- tty: terminal mode control (setraw, setcbreak, isatty)

@@ -86,6 +86,12 @@ const multiprocessing_mod = @import("../multiprocessing_mod.zig");

 const select_mod = @import("../select_mod.zig");
+const signal_mod = @import("../signal_mod.zig");
+const mmap_mod = @import("../mmap_mod.zig");
+const fcntl_mod = @import("../fcntl_mod.zig");
+const termios_mod = @import("../termios_mod.zig");
+const pty_mod = @import("../pty_mod.zig");

 /// Handler function type for module dispatchers
 const ModuleHandler = *const fn (*NativeCodegen, []ast.Node) CodegenError!void;

 /// Module to function map lookup
 const ModuleMap = std.StaticStringMap(FuncMap).initComptime(.{
     .{ "json", JsonFuncs },
@@ -1672,6 +1856,12 @@ const ModuleMap = std.StaticStringMap(FuncMap).initComptime(.{
